CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Entering Judgment Against Defendant Pursuant To Ccp 664.6
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq. (415-680-5731) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

PLAINTIFFS AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB AND AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S Motion For Order Entering Judgment Against Defendant Pursuant To CCP 664.6 is GRANTED. Plaintiffs are entitled to judgment in their favor against defendant Stephanie Phung in the amount of $4,200.27 plus costs. No opposition filed. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
